title: Mustang Jeans Hoodie — Pink
image_captions: Pink hoodie with 'MUSTANG TRUE DENIM' logo on chest. Neck tag reading Mustang Size M. No tape measure visible.
Pink hoodie with 'MUSTANG TRUE DENIM' logo on chest. Neck tag reading Mustang Size M. No tape measure visible.
Pink hoodie detail showing white 'MUST' and 'TRUE' text with a horse logo on the chest.
Neck tag reading Mustang Jeans, size M. Care label showing 100% Cotton.
Neck tag reading MUSTANG Bella H Print M ERAC. Care label showing 80% Cotton, 20% Polyester.
Vertical tape measure showing 60cm at the hem edge.
Horizontal tape measure showing 50cm at the garment's edge.
Back view showing Pink hoodie with hood and ribbed cuffs.
enhanced_description:
Mustang Jeans Hoodie — Pink
Brand: Mustang Jeans
Size: M
Condition: Excellent
Composition: 80% Cotton, 20% Polyester
Color: Pink

Measurements (Laid Flat):
Pit-to-Pit: 50cm
Length: 60cm

About the Piece
Step into spring with this vibrant pink Mustang hoodie. Featuring the classic "Mustang True Denim" branding and a soft, comfortable fit, it's the perfect statement piece for any casual outfit. The ribbed cuffs and hood add a stylish touch to this versatile staple.

Style Note: Streetwear / Casual Chic

Key Detail
White "MUST" and "TRUE" text with a horse logo on the chest; Neck tag confirms size M (80% Cotton, 20% Polyester).

Seller Notes
Shipping: 🚀 Next day shipping guaranteed!

Questions? Drop a comment or send an offer. I'm responsive and ready to ship.
